narrative:
Columbia C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 422 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.7 percentage points.
